hero.name: Milena
hero.bio: Communications professional specializing in strategic storytelling, multimedia content, public relations, and institutional communications across diplomacy, higher education institutions, and cultural sectors.

projects.section_sub: Campaigns, platforms, and stories that moved the needle — in diplomacy, media, and beyond.
projects.media_desc: Rwanda's story was often told through outdated lenses. I conceptualized and led a flagship initiative inviting Qatari and regional journalists to experience Rwanda firsthand, shifting narratives toward innovation, tourism, and development.
projects.platform_desc: Built an organization's entire digital presence: website, Twitter (X), LinkedIn, and Instagram, using a three-pillar strategy: authentic storytelling, cultural relevance, and data-driven content.
projects.editorial_desc: Developed written content including proposals, speeches, press releases, institutional articles, and campaign content in collaboration with universities, media outlets, and partner organizations.
projects.rwanda_card_desc: Developed editorial content and coordinated materials for a Rwanda-focused special supplement.
projects.georgetown_card_title: Georgetown University Qatar – Rwanda Student Visit Feature
projects.georgetown_card_desc: Supported the development of a feature story on students' visit to Rwanda in collaboration with Georgetown University in Qatar.
projects.photo_desc: Visual documentation during MoU signings, high-level meetings, and diplomatic functions — professional, platform-ready images that support institutional storytelling.
projects.graphics_desc: Custom graphics and visual assets using Canva and Adobe Illustrator, tailored to cultural celebrations, elections, and institutional public awareness campaigns.

journey.section_sub: Institutions that trust me to tell their stories — diplomacy, higher education, and creative industries, across Qatar and beyond.
journey.job_1_org: Embassy of the Republic of Rwanda to the State of Qatar
journey.job_1_desc: Lead strategic communications and cultural diplomacy initiatives while managing public-facing projects, international events and exhibitions, and stakeholder relations.
journey.job_2_role: Acting Executive Assistant to the Ambassador (Interim)
journey.job_2_org: Embassy of the Republic of Rwanda to the State of Qatar
journey.job_2_desc: Supported diplomatic coordination, institutional communication, and administrative workflow during high-level engagements and events.
journey.job_3_desc: Assisted with public diplomacy initiatives, event support, and development of communication materials for outreach programs.
journey.job_4_desc: Supported multimedia storytelling, content production, and communication projects focused on youth and institutional programs.
journey.job_5_desc: Managed social media content and digital campaigns for student-led media projects and events.
journey.job_6_desc: Assisted in digital content creation and marketing communications across multiple platforms.
journey.job_7_desc: Supported student services, communications, and event coordination within the Student Affairs department.

education.section_sub: Across Education City universities — advanced skills in communication, social media, and digital storytelling in a richly multicultural environment.
education.deg_1_title: Master of Arts in Digital Humanities and Societies
education.deg_2_title: BS in Communication, Major in Media Industries & Technology
education.deg_3_school: NU-Q in collaboration with Georgetown University – Qatar

beyond.speaking_desc: Co-founded a public speaking community that organizes workshops, events, and The Speaking Circle podcast.
beyond.cooking_desc: When I'm not crafting messages, I'm mixing flavors. Cooking is my hobby, my therapy, and my favourite way to communicate.
beyond.volunteering_desc: Because someone opened the door for me, I make sure it stays open for those behind me through giving back to the community.

contact.quote: I would love to hear about your experience and how we can work together.
